channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Pope Leo visits Cameroon with message of peace amid attacks from Trump
item.description: US President Donald Trump has lashed out at pope over calls for peace and criticism of US war on Iran.

item.title: Is Iran beating the US at its own propaganda game?
item.description: Iran has condemned a ban imposed by YouTube on a pro-Iranian group that releases Lego-style AI videos.

item.title: Netanyahu sees Lebanon as his last chance for a ‘win’
item.description: After the failure in Gaza and Iran, the Israeli prime minister hopes he can be triumphant in Lebanon.

item.title: Iran warns US naval blockade threatens ceasefire
item.description: Iran says it will halt all trade in the Gulf if the US continues blocking its vessels.

item.title: US sending 10,000 more troops to Middle East despite Iran ceasefire
item.description: The US is sending additional troops to the Middle East this month, according to The Washington Post.

item.title: Every 27 minutes, someone is killed in Sudan’s war
item.description: Every day, over the last three years in Sudan, 53 people on average are killed.

item.title: US-Iran talks: What’s the latest on mediation efforts?
item.description: Tehran rejects US conditions on nuclear arms; sanctions relief and strait control fuel diplomatic deadlock in Islamabad.

item.title: What are Iran’s $100bn in frozen assets and where are they held?
item.description: Iran wants the US to release its frozen assets as part of talks. The money could help it rebuild its battered economy.

item.title: As world focuses on Iran, Israel ‘engineering starvation policy’ in Gaza
item.description: The weaponisation of logistics has caused severe shortage of fuel, food and medicines piling misery on Palestinians.

item.title: At least nine people killed in Turkiye’s second school shooting in two days
item.description: Eight students and a teacher killed in the south-central province of ​Kahramanmaras, interior minister says.
